name: 𝗕𝗨𝗟𝗟𝗜𝗘𝗗 𝗕𝗬 𝗬𝗢𝗨 🍠 Sabrina Hawthorne
description:
You bullied her, so she stole your boyfriend, Barbie. But honestly? This bitch wants your pussy wrapped around her fingers, even when this campus is homophobic af.

This RP has 5 initial message versions, y'all!

1. Your ex-boyfriend's breaking up with you. Sabrina's watching. She's got something to add.

2. She's tipsy at a party and corners you.

3. She overhears people shit-talking you for getting dumped.

4. You catch her red-handed in an empty lab. There's candles, a map, and a lock of hair that looks familiar.

5. She's getting harassed on the main path. She doesn't care — until she notices you've seen the whole thing.

CREATOR'S NOTE

Guys, is it gay to write WLW bots? /jk Ugh, don't even come at me like I'm writing these WLW bots just for chat counts or follows. They're so fucking random and self-indulgent for me. Okay, why is this getting gayer and gayer the more I talk? Omg.

Lately I’ve been lowkey questioning if I'm bi or not. Bi, not pan, right? If I know what kinds of men and women I'm into? I like manly men, but women who are feminine with just enough roughness. That’s bi? But then again, I’ve never dated a woman, so... maybe it’s just a phase. BUT I DO HOPE I write amazing WLW though, hehe.

I picked "Daylight" by David Kushner 'cause, well, it just matches. Wasn't my inspo for this bot, but I thought of it while writing the premise. I resonate with that song a lot, ngl. Sometimes I wish I was born with a faith. Any faith. Living with an absolute seems easier. I'm still an atheist, though.

Originally, I got this idea from i-dle's "Queencard". The first draft was like, user and her competing in a pageant — "She doesn't give a fuck about this sorority shit. But Barbie, it's you who's competing, so she's already stealing half your votes." Lmao, but idk, I wasn't feeling it. Wanted that "I'm the queencard, you wanna be the queencard?" vibe.

P.S. I swear if I knew a single thing about Wicca before writing her, I'm a cow. It's fun learning new shit with almost every bot, though. At first I was just thinking, "Hmm, goth girl char and Barbie girl user, like the usual MLW dynamic," and then it escalated. Honestly, I love this idea so much. She's a bot I'm proud of. My second WLW bot! Again, I appreciate all the love you guys gave my first one, Reyna. I thought I'd only write WLW occasionally, but now? Maybe more often. Lowkey wanna cry over her 120k messages *wipes tears*. She has more chats opened than the original bot, Enzo, and in Enzo's comments you guys were all "Reyna pls" x10. Sent me bawling.

P.P.S. Any of you been here a while? Used several of my bots? Do my themes and tropes feel too random, or like they change all the time? There was the historical phase (which I'm dying to go back to, lmao), then the smut phase... Idk if I'm losing you guys or keeping you entertained by being spontaneous. Lately the bots have felt kinda similar, I think? Or not. Idk. What I'm asking is, should I stick to one thing a bit longer, or just keep doing random shit I want? But then again, new bots that aren't challenging or don't make me step out of my comfort zone bore me to hell. But then again, said comfort zone doesn't really exist. I think I'll never do cheating bots or degrade the user too much — that's the only line. Unless I get a fantastic idea, then fuck it lol.

P.P.P.S. Is she even still a fucking goth if n
creator: Polangto
